create.title: Create event
create.subtitle: Fill in the details below to create a new event.

description.label: Description
description.placeholder: Describe the event objective, agenda, and any relevant details...
description.hint: A good description helps the AI suggest the right event type.

eventType.label: Event type
eventType.suggested: Type suggested by AI — you can change it anytime.

modules.title: Modules
modules.unsavedHint: Toggle modules on or off, then save your changes.

participantList.label: Participant List
participantList.description: Track confirmed attendees and manage RSVPs for this event.

checklist.label: Pre-event Checklist
checklist.description: Tasks and documents attendees must complete before the event.

budget.label: Budget & Cost
budget.description: Track expenses and set a budget cap for this event.

notifications.label: Notifications
notifications.description: Send automated reminders and alerts to attendees.

contacts.label: Contact Info
contacts.description: Collect emergency contacts and dietary preferences.
